!!! error TS-1: Pre-emit (0) and post-emit (4) diagnostic counts do not match! This can indicate that a semantic _error_ was added by the emit resolver - such an error may not be reflected on the command line or in the editor, but may be captured in a baseline here!
!!! related TS-1: The excess diagnostics are:
!!! related TS2304 test.tsx:12:5: Cannot find name 'meta'.

==== Element.ts (0 errors) ====
    declare namespace JSX {
        interface Element {
            name: string;
            isIntrinsic: boolean;
            isCustomElement: boolean;
            toString(renderId?: number): string;
            bindDOM(renderId?: number): number;
            resetComponent(): void;
            instantiateComponents(renderId?: number): number;
            props: any;
        }
    }
    export namespace Element {
        export function isElement(el: any): el is JSX.Element {
            return el.markAsChildOfRootElement !== undefined;
        }
    
        export function createElement(args: any[]) {
    
            return {
            }
        }
    }
    
    export let createElement = Element.createElement;
    
    function toCamelCase(text: string): string {
        return text[0].toLowerCase() + text.substring(1);
    }
    
==== test.tsx (0 errors) ====
    import { Element} from './Element';
    
    let c: {
    	a?: {
    		b: string
    	}
    };
    
    class A {
    	view() {
    		return [
    			<meta content="helloworld"></meta>,
    			<meta content={c.a!.b}></meta>
    		];
    	}
    }
